name: NexMetals Mining Corp.
description: NexMetals Mining Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the redevelopment of previously producing assets containing base and critical metals, including nickel, copper, cobalt, and platinum group elements. The company's primary strategy is centered on its flagship Selebi and Selkirk projects located in Botswana, a jurisdiction recognized for its mining-friendly environment. By leveraging existing infrastructure and focusing on resource growth through strategic drilling, NexMetals aims to develop a sustainable supply of critical metals to meet global demand.
